name: Pengame
short_description: Shoot your way through a corrupted notebook as the hand-drawn stickman named... Stickman! Explore a frame-by-frame animated world, and save it from evil by the power of shooting things in the face in this 2D action platformer.
detailed_description:
“Somewhere on the margin of a page, a little stickman was drawn.”

Pengame is a 2D shooter platformer set in an imaginative, frame-by-frame animated world. Explore a monster-infested notebook as the hand-drawn hero, Stickman, who is destined to defeat the vilest creature ever sketched on a page: The Teacher!

“The number of foes was increasing. Good, he thought – it was a clear sign, he was getting closer to where he was meant to be.”

A young student, bored during his classes, has created a vast world in his notebook. There was peace and harmony, until he made a horrible mistake: he sketched the most horrifying creature he could imagine on one of the sacred pages.

Fight your way through the notebook as Stickman, one of the numerous chosen ones destined to cleanse this hand-drawn world from the evil influence of The Teacher!

“It is fun to shoot things, we learned this about myself so far.”

Combat and exploration are the heart of Pengame. Stickman is a natural jumper, with some less-than-natural time manipulation abilities. He also has access to various weapons, with unique strengths and weaknesses. Mastering his arsenal and making use of his time manipulation talents are crucial to prevail against overwhelming odds and traverse through the most treacherous areas of the notebook.

  • Double jumping & wall jumps.

  • Dash teleportation.

  • 4 unique guns, each with an alternative firing mode.

  • Various temporarily wieldable superweapons.

  • Time manipulation abilities (Bullet time & Time reverse).

“The old cowboy had his doubts about this new champion. He has seen so many fall, yet watching his world decay, he didn’t have the luxury to be picky.”

What should you expect to find in Pengame?

  • Hand-drawn graphics along with frame-by-frame animation (all done on paper).

  • An original fully voice-acted story campaign.

  • Over 40 unique enemy types and 7 bosses.

  • Linear story progression through hand-crafted levels, with optional exploration.

  • A gauntlet mode for those who want to keep going after beating the campaign.

supported_languages:
English*, Hungarian
*languages with full audio support
